name: Nextora
tagline: WordPress block theme — modern FSE with Tailwind CSS v4
description: A production-ready WordPress block theme built for full-site editing. Ships with 12 custom Gutenberg blocks (hero, post grid, image gallery, testimonial carousel, scrolling promotion, spotlight search, and more), Tailwind CSS v4 design tokens, TypeScript, PHPStan, and PHPUnit. Includes WooCommerce integration, Elementor support, and a comprehensive quality pipeline.

name: BePlus Visual Mega Nav
tagline: Gutenberg-powered mega menu builder for WordPress
description: Build rich mega menus visually using the WordPress block editor. Features per-item settings (width, background, animation), import/export template store, ARIA-accessible keyboard navigation, and CSS custom properties for easy theme integration. Works natively with Appearance → Menus.
features: CSS custom properties for theme overrides

name: Prompt to Pattern
tagline: AI-powered block pattern composition for WordPress
description: Describe a page layout in natural language and let AI compose it from existing block patterns. Supports multiple AI providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, DeepSeek), guaranteed-valid markup in Pattern mode, and creative generation in V2 mode. Works inside the block editor with a simple sidebar panel.

name: BePlus Fast Product Filter
tagline: Live product filtering & search for WooCommerce
description: A Gutenberg-native WooCommerce plugin that adds instant product filtering and live search without page reloads. Built with TypeScript, esbuild, and PHP 8.0+. Features advanced filtering blocks, real-time results, and a mobile-optimized search UX.
features: Live product filtering without page reload
